news.headline: Dow Jones futures up as Arm Holdings falls despite beating views; Tesla skids while BYD soars.
news.summary: Arm Holdings exceeded expectations but experienced a decline due to underwhelming guidance following a surge in AI chip stocks the previous day. Tesla shares continued to drop while BYD saw a significant increase. Dow Jones futures are on the rise amidst these developments.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures climb after jobless claims; Roblox plunges 28% on sales miss. Nvidia's Arm stock also drops.
news.summary: On Thursday, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase following unexpected weekly jobless claims. The stock of Nvidia partner Arm declined due to earnings, whereas Roblox saw a significant decrease. Roblox crashed by 28% as a result of missing sales targets.

news.headline: Trustly partners with Spreedly to offer Pay by Bank globally, enhancing conversion rates for merchants.
news.summary: In SAN CARLOS, Calif., Trustly, the top Pay by Bank provider, revealed a new partnership with Spreedly, the leading Open Payments Platform globally. This collaboration aims to offer merchants complete access to Pay by Bank, enhancing conversion rates and streamlining payments across various regional and global markets. By teaming up, Trustly and Spreedly enable businesses using Spreedly to leverage Trustly's Pay by Bank functionalities, resulting in increased efficiency.

news.headline: Know Labs' formalized client engagement process for KTL is launched to integrate RFDS tech with 300+ global patents.
news.summary: In Seattle, Know Labs, Inc. (OTC: KNWN) has officially introduced its structured client engagement process for Know Labs Technology Licensing (KTL). This process aims to facilitate a smooth integration and innovation opportunity with KTL's patented Radio Frequency Dielectric Spectroscopy (RFDS) technology, products, and services for corporations, universities, and research institutions. This launch leverages Know Labs' extensive intellectual property (IP) portfolio, which includes over 300 global patents.

news.headline: Planet Labs will participate in Citi conference on Feb 19th, 2025. Robert Cardillo will speak about Earth insights.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL), a prominent Earth data provider, disclosed that Robert Cardillo, Chief Strategist and Chairman of Planet Federal's Board, will engage in a fireside chat at Citi’s 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference on February 19, 2025, at 2:40 p.m. EST. The dialogue, led by Jason Gursky, Managing Director & Equity Research Analyst at Citi, will feature insights from Cardillo about the company's strategies. This event showcases the industry's rapid advancements and future projections.

news.headline: CertaPro Painters® acquires majority interest in CertaPro Painters® of San Francisco, expanding its operations in Northern California.
news.summary: An announcement was made by a franchise organization regarding their fourth strategic joint-venture in AUDUBON, Pennsylvania on February 6, 2025. CertaPro Painters®, known as North America's Most Referred Painting Company®, has bought a majority stake in CertaPro Painters® of San Francisco. This acquisition marks the fourth company-owned operation for CertaPro Painters®.

news.headline: Private equity firm Avathon Capital acquires founder-owned early childhood education platform Yellow Brick Road, strengthening commitment to education. Located in the Midwest, the acquisition marks a significant investment in the sector.
news.summary: Avathon Capital, a private equity firm focused on the lower middle-market, has made an investment in Yellow Brick Road, a center-based platform operating in the Midwest region. With its strong background in early childhood education, Avathon is aiming to support the growth of Yellow Brick Road, a founder-owned company. The investment was announced on Feb. 6, 2025, in Chicago and Minneapolis. This move is part of Avathon's strategic plan to expand its portfolio and leverage its expertise in the sector.

news.headline: Polar Racking aims to reach 10GW annual production for global solar projects, with 5GW total capacity. US job creation prioritized.
news.summary: Polar Racking, a prominent company specializing in cutting-edge solar mounting solutions, announced on February 6, 2025, its strategic plan to focus on producing content and generating job opportunities within the United States. The company, based in Toronto, emphasizes its commitment to domestic growth and employment as part of its expansion efforts. With an extensive total production capacity of 5 gigawatts (GW) spread across its various locations worldwide, Polar Racking is determined to strengthen its presence in the US market.

news.headline: Dr. Harry Salinas named 2025 Top Patient Rated Plastic Surgeon in Miami by Find Local Doctors, praised for advanced surgical skills.
news.summary: Renowned for his exceptional surgical expertise, Dr. Salinas has transformed the lives of numerous patients with remarkable outcomes. Specializing in reconstructive plastic surgery of the breast and face, he brings a wealth of experience to his practice. Recently recognized as a top professional in 2025, Dr. Salinas operates out of Bay Harbor Islands in Florida.

news.headline: Mexico's Gutierrez: Mexico wants to substitute semiconductor imports.
Spruce by Procter & Gamble (NYSE: PG) is a worry-free weed killer for lawns, showing visible results in one hour.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Spruce, a powerful weed & grass killer developed by Procter & Gamble (NYSE: PG), is offering a solution for reclaiming your yard this spring. This innovative product promises visible results within just one hour of application. Differentiating itself in the lawn and garden market, Spruce consists of only nine basic yet efficient ingredients, ensuring safety for both individuals and pets when used as instructed. Families can now freely enjoy outdoor spaces without worrying about harmful chemicals.

news.headline: Eco-friendly TP brand Who Gives A Crap offers 'World Dump Day' breakup service; 42% Americans struggle with breakups.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, a recent study by the sustainable toilet paper company Who Gives A Crap revealed that 42% of Americans find breaking up difficult due to not wanting to hurt their partner’s feelings, and 17% struggle with finding the right words to say. To address this, Who Gives A Crap is launching a one-day breakup service on February 13, known as World Dump Day. The service aims to assist individuals in ending unsatisfactory relationships with empathy and humor. This unique service offers a thoughtful and human approach to breakups.

news.headline: True Religion launches "Own Your True" platform with Brazilian Pop Star Anitta during Super Bowl week in 2025.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, True Religion is starting off the year 2025 by introducing its fresh brand platform called "Own Your True."

news.headline: Philip Morris shares soar as forecast exceeds analyst predictions.
Chinese wind exports drive global market shift, expanding swiftly.
Fiber Broadband Association's study shows stable or slightly increasing deployment costs, improvement from previous year.
news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association released its Fiber Deployment Cost Annual Report, carried out by Cartesian. The report analyzed the expenses associated with fiber broadband deployment. It revealed that broadband service providers anticipate similar or slightly increased future costs compared to 2024, with a projected increase of less than 10%. This represents a noticeable improvement from the previous year's findings. Specifically, median costs for underground deployment saw a year-over-year change.

news.headline: mPulse's strong 2024 ends with the launch of AI CoE in 2025 to enhance CX strategies with Generative AI.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, mPulse®, a top Health Experience and Insights (HXI) technology provider, revealed robust performance metrics for 2024. Additionally, they introduced their AI Center of Excellence (CoE) aimed at managing and supervising mPulse's AI initiatives. The AI CoE enhances mPulse's expertise in implementing machine learning, predictive AI, and Natural Language Understanding (NLU) tools. It also integrates Generative AI to access profound insights and enhance CX strategies.

news.headline: Dynacor Group closes C$31.6M public offering with 5,750,000 common shares issued under prospectus supplement.
news.summary: Montreal-based Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX-DNG) has successfully completed a recent agency offering, closing the deal on February 3, 2025. The "best efforts" Offering involved issuing 5,750,000 common shares as outlined in the Prospectus Supplement, which was based on the Corporation's Shelf Prospectus from January 28, 2025. This move is part of Dynacor's strategic financial initiatives to enhance capital flow and strengthen its market position.

news.headline: Swimlane reports 107% YoY adoption growth for its AI hyperautomation platform in 2024, cements position as top security automation choice.
news.summary: In Denver, Swimlane, a provider of AI hyperautomation solutions for security organizations, revealed a significant milestone today. They announced a remarkable 107% year-over-year increase in the adoption of their Swimlane Turbine AI hyperautomation platform. This surge in adoption solidifies Swimlane's position as a leading and extensively used security automation platform. Many enterprises are now relying on agentic AI automation to enhance their security operations. The substantial growth reflects the increasing recognition of the effectiveness and necessity of AI-driven solutions in fortifying security measures.

news.headline: Multiples invests around USD 200M to acquire controlling stake in QBurst, based in India and Fairfax, VA.
news.summary: A major investment firm based in Mumbai, India, in collaboration with its co-investors, has confirmed the acquisition of a majority share in QBurst, a company with expertise in artificial intelligence. The deal, which involves the purchase of a controlling stake, has been finalized with definitive agreements.

news.headline: Arab Palestinian Investment Company raises capital by $30 million through secondary offering for shareholders.
news.summary: In Ramallah, Palestine on February 6, 2025, the Arab Palestinian Investment Company held an extraordinary general assembly. Tarek Aggad, the Chairman and CEO, presided over the meeting. Members of the company's Board were also in attendance.

news.headline: Triton Digital and Optable team up to offer identity technology to premium audio publishers in New York.
news.summary: In a recent collaboration, Triton Digital and Optable have partnered to provide premium audio publishers with access to advanced identity technology. This partnership aims to enhance the capabilities of publishers by leveraging Triton Digital's expertise in digital audio and Optable's cutting-edge identity solutions. Through this alliance, publishers will have the opportunity to utilize state-of-the-art technology to optimize their audio offerings.

news.headline: Craveworthy Brands opens first taim Mediterranean Kitchen in Chicago, expanding founder's concept to Midwest.  #NewRestaurant #MediterraneanCuisine #Chicago
news.summary: Today, on February 6th, 2025, Craveworthy Brands, a renowned multi-brand restaurant platform, has launched taim Mediterranean Kitchen ("taim") in Chicago. The establishment, founded by a Food Network champion, marks the entry of the Mediterranean concept into the Midwest. This debut signifies a significant milestone for Craveworthy Brands as it diversifies its offerings.

news.headline: 59% of breaches in top 150 insurance companies due to third-party attacks, exposing vulnerabilities, per SecurityScorecard.
news.summary: Recently, SecurityScorecard published a study revealing that 59% of security breaches within the top 150 insurance firms were due to third-party attack vectors. This highlights significant vulnerabilities in the industry's supply chain. These findings emphasize the widespread dangers posed by cyber threats to a sector tasked with protecting sensitive financial and personal data. The insurance field's intricate web linking carriers, reinsurers, brokers, and claims processors is at considerable risk due to these breaches.

news.headline: BlueWave receives $118.2M funding from City National Bank and First American to support Maine solar projects.
news.summary: BlueWave, a prominent solar developer, owner, and operator, has secured financing for its Maine project portfolio from City National Bank and First American Commercial Bancorp. This funding is aimed at advancing community solar initiatives for local residents and businesses. The financial support, acquired on February 6, 2025, underlines BlueWave's commitment to expanding renewable energy sources.

news.headline: TD SYNNEX to host Investor Day on April 10, 2025 in New York City, featuring updates on strategy and financial targets.
news.summary: TD SYNNEX, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SNX, is set to hold an Investor Day on April 10, 2025, in New York City starting at 8:30 a.m. ET. The event will include presentations from the management team, sharing insights on strategy, market prospects, and financial goals. This half-day program aims to provide stakeholders with a comprehensive update. The Investor Day can be attended in person in New York, NY, or viewed through a live video webcast.

news.headline: James Hardie presenting new products at NAHB Show in Vegas for Durability, Sustainability, and Design. Leading home building products company, #1 siding brand in North America.
news.summary: The leading siding brand in North America is gearing up to present its latest products emphasizing Durability, Sustainability, and Design. James Hardie Building Products Inc., a prominent player in the North American home building sector, will be making a comeback showcasing their innovative solutions. Stay updated for the event happening in Chicago on February 6, 2025.

news.headline: Forescout honors partners at 2025 Sales Kickoff with Global Partner of the Year awards. Celebrating top industry leaders.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, cybersecurity leader Forescout Technologies, Inc. announced the recipients of its first-ever Global Partner of the Year awards during the 2025 Sales Kickoff meeting. The winners, who are part of Forescout's Envision Partner Program, were honored for their exceptional performance in providing advanced security solutions using the Forescout Platform. These awards recognize industry leaders who contribute significantly to bolstering customers' cybersecurity posture.

news.headline: Expel introduces new data lake option, improves SIEM coverage, aiding compliance. Extending support for industry-leading XDR.
news.summary: Expel, a prominent managed detection and response (MDR) provider based in Herndon, Virginia, revealed an enhancement in their security information and event management (SIEM) services. This includes the introduction of a cost-effective data lake service to assist customers in fulfilling compliance and data storage obligations more efficiently, thereby enhancing their security stance. Furthermore, Expel expanded its integration support for various top SIEM and extended detection and response (XDR) platforms.

news.headline: Clarion Safety Systems acquires McLoone Metal Graphics, a custom industrial printer, on Feb 6, 2025.
news.summary: Clarion Safety Systems, a top supplier of visual safety and compliance products and services, has recently purchased McLoone Metal Graphics, a custom industrial printer. The acquisition took place in MILFORD, Pa., on Feb. 6, 2025, as reported by PRNewswire. Clarion Safety Systems, known for its expertise in visual safety solutions, has strengthened its portfolio by adding McLoone Metal Graphics, a renowned player in the custom industrial printing sector.

news.headline: cPacket's cStor200S packet capture appliance achieves 200Gbps capture-to-disk with zero packet loss, validated by Tolly Group.
news.summary: cPacket Networks Inc. is pleased to announce that the Tolly Group has verified the exceptional performance of their packet capture appliance, the cStor200S. The Tolly Group, a respected independent testing organization, has confirmed that the cStor200S can sustain 200Gbps capture-to-disk speed, providing real-time analytics and indexing without any packet loss. This appliance sets a new benchmark in the industry for packet capture standards, ensuring efficient handling of data in complex network environments.

news.headline: Jay Yonamine appointed as CPO at EdgeRunner AI, specializing in on-device AI for military/enterprise. CEO Tyler Saltsman is excited about the industry expert.
news.summary: EdgeRunner AI, a prominent provider of air-gapped, on-device AI agents for military and enterprise sectors, revealed the appointment of Jay Yonamine as the company's inaugural Chief Product Officer (CPO). Tyler Saltsman, the Founder & CEO of EdgeRunner AI, expressed excitement about the addition of Jay to oversee product management at the company. Jay brings extensive experience in crafting cutting-edge consumer and enterprise AI solutions, along with a profound comprehension of the significant role AI plays in geopolitical contexts.

news.headline: AV Laboratories introduces Face Cream Rich and Eye Cream to elevate skin care with enhanced nourishment and hydration.
news.summary: In New York, AVL Laboratories introduced Face Cream Rich and Eye Cream to their luxury skin longevity brand's portfolio. These new products join Essentials Duo, Face Serum, and Face Cream Light, offering advanced customization for skin care routines. Face Cream Rich and Eye Cream provide superior nourishment, moisture, hydration, and overall wellness to the skin. AVL Laboratories continues to set the standard in science-backed age-defying skincare.

news.headline: Cofactr acquires Factor.io to manage complex supply chains linking thousands of parts, hundreds of suppliers in the US.
news.summary: Cofactr, a platform specializing in supply chain and logistics management for high-compliance hardware manufacturers, recently disclosed the acquisition of Factor.io, an AI-driven solution. Factor.io enhances efficiency by automating the ordering and tracking of all necessary materials and components from various suppliers. This acquisition aims to enhance Cofactr's capabilities in parts sourcing, production processes, and overall operational efficiency for manufacturers. By automating the procurement and tracking process, Factor.io enables manufacturers to seamlessly move through sourcing and shipping tasks.

news.headline: dataplor released a foot traffic analysis report on fast-food preferences in America, coinciding with a new mobility product.
news.summary: A report on Americans’ fast-food preferences was recently released by dataplor, a prominent global location intelligence provider based in Manhattan Beach, California. The report, accompanying the launch of their new mobility product, utilizes extensive Point of Interest (POI) data and footfall counts to offer businesses enhanced insights into consumer behavior. The analysis showcases regional and national trends in fast-food choices, providing valuable information for companies. This offering aims to provide businesses with a deeper understanding of consumer visits, enabling them to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Exclusive Resorts celebrates record growth in 2024, delivering 19,000 vacations and solidifying its position as a premier luxury travel club.
news.summary: Denver-based Exclusive Resorts, a leading members-only Club offering luxury travel and curated experiences, has achieved remarkable growth for the fifth year in a row. In 2024, the company exceeded financial expectations by delivering 19,000 vacations. This accomplishment cements its status as the top private community in the luxury travel sector worldwide. As Exclusive Resorts continues to grow, its original concept of luxury travel has transformed into a comprehensive initiative with a broader vision.

news.headline: ezCater launched new public menu API for restaurant tech integration, streamlining catering operations; reduces manual effort.
news.summary: In Boston, the leading food tech platform for US workplaces, ezCater, has unveiled a new public menu API. This innovation allows restaurant tech platforms to seamlessly connect with ezCater, assisting restaurants in synchronizing menus and simplifying catering operations. Through menu syncing, eateries can efficiently oversee their ezCater catering menus via integrated middleware or POS solutions. This feature significantly decreases the manual workload required for menu adjustments, minimizing errors.

news.headline: Destination XL Group (NASDAQ: DXLG) partners with Bluecore to enhance personalization and customer movement in an expanded collaboration.
news.summary: Destination XL Group, Inc (DXLG), a prominent specialty retailer of Big + Tall men’s clothing and shoes traded on NASDAQ, revealed an extended collaboration with Bluecore, a technology company specializing in identifying retail shoppers and tracking customer behavior. The retailer chose Bluecore as their sole tech partner for identifying customers, constructing target audiences, segmenting data, and managing campaigns. This move streamlines marketing efforts by integrating multiple technologies under one platform.

news.headline: HungerRush™ partners with Backofhouse.io and Gordon Food Service to offer technology solutions to US restaurants.
news.summary: In Houston, HungerRush™, a top provider of restaurant technology solutions, has teamed up with Backofhouse.io, a venture under Gordon Food Service's ownership. This strategic partnership will offer restaurants nationwide access to HungerRush's top-notch point-of-sale (POS) and online ordering systems. Through this collaboration, restaurants can improve operational efficiency and boost online ordering and delivery services.

news.headline: Appriss Retail and Optoro partner to combat returns fraud, enhance consumer experience with AI technology.
news.summary: A collaboration has been initiated between Appriss Retail and Optoro, two prominent companies in the retail industry. Appriss Retail specializes in loss reduction solutions while Optoro excels in technology for retail returns. This partnership aims to provide retailers with an innovative returns solution utilizing AI and retail analytics. The goal is to combat returns fraud and enhance profit margins. Overall, the partnership offers a top-tier solution for retailers seeking to improve their operations and customer experience.

news.headline: Agillic A/S releases updated 2024 results and 2025 guidance; new date announced for release.
PPG extends Tasca Racing sponsorship for 2025 drag racing season, PPG Nitro Mustang to race in four events, including three NHRA races.
news.summary: In Strongsville, Ohio, PPG (NYSE: PPG) has revealed an extension of its sponsorship with the Tasca Racing team for the 2025 season. The PPG Nitro Mustang Dark Horse Funny Car will be featured in four events, with three being part of the NHRA Mission Foods Drag Racing Series. The debut of the PPG Nitro Mustang Funny Car is set for Feb. 6-8 at the PRO Superstar Shootout at Bradenton Motorsport.

news.headline: Hershey's beats Q4 earnings with $2.69 EPS and $2.89B sales. Stock up in premarket; cocoa prices a concern for 2025.
news.summary: Hershey Company's (NYSE:HSY) stock is showing gains in premarket trading on Thursday following the release of its fourth-quarter financial results. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $2.69, surpassing expectations of $2.37. Quarterly sales totaled $2.89 billion, marking an 8.7% increase from the previous year and exceeding the analyst consensus of $2.84 billion. Organic, constant currency net sales witnessed a 9.0% growth driven by factors such as inventory timing benefits and higher net price realization. The North America Confectionery segment reported net sales of $2.354.2 billion, a 6% year-over-year increase, while the North America Salty Snacks segment saw a significant rise of 35.9% with net sales amounting to $278.9 million. The International segment also experienced growth, increasing by 9.8% year over year to $254.5 million.

news.headline: InvoiceCloud and POWERCONNECT.AI partner to offer integrated AI and payment solutions for utilities to enhance customer experience.
news.summary: InvoiceCloud, a prominent provider of digital bill payment services, has partnered with POWERCONNECT.AI, the top AI accelerator in the energy and utility sector. Together, they aim to provide advanced AI and payment solutions for utilities to enhance customer experiences. This collaboration offers integrated features for customers and service agents, tailored specifically for the industry. The AI integration will benefit clients utilizing Oracle, SAP, and other Customer Information Systems (CIS), improving support for them.

news.headline: Avangrid signs PPA with American Municipal Power for energy from Blue Creek project in Ohio, supporting communities.
news.summary: In Portland, Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company under the Iberdrola Group, disclosed a recent agreement with American Municipal Power, Inc. (AMP) for a short-term Power Purchase Agreement (PPA). This deal involves a segment of the energy generated from Avangrid’s Blue Creek project in Ohio. The agreement aims to sustain a stable energy supply for the region and bolster rural Ohio communities through job creation, lease payments, and tax revenue. The Blue Creek project stands to significantly impact the local economy.

news.headline: NetSuite (Oracle) introduces AI tech to enhance efficiency, productivity, and business model adaptation. #SuiteConnect #AIInnovations
news.summary: In a recent announcement in New York on Feb. 6, 2025, Oracle NetSuite introduced a range of AI enhancements, along with additional product options and integrations. This move is aimed at assisting businesses to quicken their processes, enhance productivity, and adopt innovative business models. The AI innovations are designed to improve the overall efficiency of operations.

news.headline: Camposol Holding PLC to announce Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 25, 2025, at 09:00 am Peru Time. CEO and IRO to host conference call. Register at given link. Webcast available.
news.summary: Camposol Holding PLC has scheduled the release of its preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, February 25, 2025, at 09:00 am Peru Time (EST). The CEO, Ricardo Naranjo Fernandez, and IRO, Jossue Yesquen Lihim, will conduct a conference call presentation and Q&A session in conjunction with the announcement. To register for the conference call and participate, click on the provided link: https://register.vevent.com/register/BId9217e6bdf55467f879176a97565ddf9. Participants are recommended to log in a few minutes early to check their settings. For access to the webcast presentation linked to the call, utilize the following link.

news.headline: BoE DMP Survey: Expectations for employment growth have also declined over recent months. In the three months to January, firms expected no growth in employment over the year ahead.
Gates Industrial Corp (NYSE:GTES) exceeded Q4 earnings estimate by 9.0%, reporting $0.36 EPS vs. $0.33. Revenue declined by $33.90 million.
news.summary: Gates Industrial Corp (NYSE:GTES) unveiled its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, February 6, 2025 at 08:00 AM. The latest financials revealed that the company surpassed anticipated earnings by 9.0%, posting an EPS of $0.36 compared to the estimated $0.33. Although there was a decrease in revenue, as it fell by $33.90 million, investors can find out more by reading the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NetSuite introduces new AI features for improved efficiency; aims to enhance workflows and customization. NYC, Feb 6, 2025.
news.summary: NetSuite has introduced groundbreaking generative AI features and AI agents to enhance customization, streamline AI-supported processes, and aid customers in optimizing the suite's benefits. The announcement was made in New York on February 6, 2025, during SuiteConnect. Oracle NetSuite's latest AI advancements promise to significantly boost user capabilities and improve workflow efficiency.
